## Summary

Describe the change and the user-visible reason for it.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant unit tests.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] I updated documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes.

## Safety impact

- [ ] This change is read-only or does not change cluster behavior.
- [ ] This change can modify a cluster or local files; I documented the safety
      implications and confirmation/dry-run behavior.

## Related issue

Closes #
